indicators.name: tiled walls
indicators.rationale: Tiled walls can be slippery when wet, posing a safety risk for yoga practice.

indicators.name: tiled floor
indicators.rationale: Tiled floors can be slippery when wet, posing a safety risk for yoga practice.

indicators.name: tall pedestal sink
indicators.rationale: A tall pedestal sink occupies valuable floor space and could pose a tripping hazard.

indicators.name: tub with water
indicators.rationale: A tub filled with water is not suitable for yoga practice and could pose a tripping hazard.

indicators.name: open doorway
indicators.rationale: An open doorway can lead to drafts and drafts can disrupt yoga practice.

indicators.name: curtains
indicators.rationale: Curtains can be a tripping hazard and may block light, affecting mood and focus.

reasoning_summary: This bathroom is marginally adequate for yoga practice due to the presence of slippery tiled surfaces, a tall pedestal sink, a tub with water, an open doorway, and curtains. The score of 4 reflects the limited space available for yoga practice and the potential hazards posed by the objects present.
